First, I need to understand who Deshaun Watson is and what a corner kick is in the context of sports. Deshaun Watson is an American football player who plays as a quarterback in the National Football League (NFL). He is known for his role in American football, where quarterbacks are responsible for passing the ball, making decisions on plays, and leading the offense. A corner kick, on the other hand, is a term from soccer (football). In soccer, a corner kick is awarded when the ball goes out of bounds over the goal line and was last touched by a defender. The offensive team then takes a kick from the corner of the field to try to score a goal. So, the sentence suggests that Deshaun Watson, an American football quarterback, took a corner kick. Since a corner kick is a term from soccer and not from American football, this sentence is mixing two different sports and their terminology.
